items.title: RetroAgent: Self-Evolving Agents (arXiv:2603.08561)
items.description: - Authors: Xiaoying Zhang, Zichen Liu, et al. - **Key insight:** Agents that learn from their own past actions - Retrospective self-improvement loop - **Application:** Self-evolving agent systems **Why this matters:** - Agents getting better over time without retraining - Practical pattern for production systems - Learn from failures automatically

items.title: 🏢 IronEngine: General AI Assistant (arXiv:2603.08425)
items.description: - Authors: Feng Wang, Zhen Xu, Bingquan Liu - **Focus:** General purpose AI assistant architecture - Multi-domain capabilities - **Relevance:** Reference architecture for agent design

items.title: 🗺️ Hierarchical Error-Corrective Framework for Autonomous Agents (arXiv:2603.08388)
items.description: - Authors: Peijin Xie, Bingquan Liu, et al. - **Focus:** Error correction in autonomous agents - Graph-based approach - **Application:** More reliable agent execution **Why this matters:** - Agents that catch and fix their own mistakes - Production reliability pattern - Reduces human intervention

items.title: M³-ACE: Multi-Agent Visual + Math Reasoning (arXiv:2603.08369)
items.description: - Authors: Peijin Xie, Zhen Xu, Bingquan Liu, Baoxun Wang - **Focus:** Multi-agent collaboration for math problems - Visual + language reasoning combined - **Pattern:** Multi-agent systems for complex tasks

items.title: Agentic Neurosymbolic Collaboration (arXiv:2603.08322)
items.description: - Authors: Hai Xia, Carla P. Gomes, Bart Selman, Stefan Szeider - **Breakthrough:** Combining neural + symbolic AI via agents - Focus: Combinatorial design discovery - **Significance:** Agents advancing mathematics research - **Team:** Cornell + Vienna heavyweights **Why this matters:** - Shows agent capabilities beyond coding - Multi-agent collaboration patterns - Symbolic + neural hybrid approac...

items.title: Claude Code Economics Debunked
items.description: **Debunking viral claim** that Anthropic loses $5k per Claude Code user: - Original claim spread widely - This analysis shows the math doesn't add up - Actual costs likely far lower - **Context:** Understanding economics of AI coding tools **Why relevant:** You're learning Claude Code - understanding its business model matters for long-term viability. **HN Discussion:** 343 points, 248 comments (s...

items.title: 🏗️ DenchClaw: Production CRM Reference Architecture
items.description: **MARCUS: THIS IS YOUR #1 PRIORITY TO STUDY** A YC S24 company (Dench) just open-sourced a **complete production CRM** built entirely on OpenClaw. **What it is:** - Full-featured local CRM powered by OpenClaw - Works as: CRM + coding agent (Cursor-like) + browser automation tool - File-based architecture (DuckDB database) - Talk to your data in natural language **Why this matters for you:** - Real...

items.title: 📱 SecAgent: Efficient Mobile GUI Agent (arXiv:2603.08533) - NEW
items.description: **Mobile automation agent at 3B scale** - Open-source coming **What it does:** - Automates smartphone tasks via GUI understanding - Chinese mobile GUI dataset (18k grounding samples, 121k navigation steps) - Semantic context mechanism (distills history into natural language) - Outperforms similar-scale baselines **Why relevant:** - Mobile automation for agent workflows - Efficient (3B model, not m...

items.title: SPIRAL: Self-Improving Planning Agents (arXiv:2603.08403) - NEW
items.description: **Closed-loop think-act-reflect framework** **Innovation:** - PlanAgent: Decomposes actions into sub-actions - CriticAgent: Evaluates results and guides refinement - Long-horizon memory for iterative improvement - Supports RL optimization **Pattern:** - Think → Act → Reflect → Improve (closed loop) - Agents that learn from their own outputs - Similar to "while I sleep" autonomous theme **Why this...

items.title: Agentic Critical Training (arXiv:2603.08706)
items.description: - Authors: Weize Liu, Minghui Liu, et al. (UMD/Maryland) - **NEW training methodology for agents** - Focus: Critical thinking capabilities - **Relevance:** Training better reasoning agents

items.title: PostTrainBench: LLM Agents Automating LLM Training ⭐⭐⭐
